scripts.build: npm run build -w @market-ops/shared && npm run build -w @market-ops/api && npm run build -w @market-ops/web
scripts.ci:verify: npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.dev:web: npm run build -w @market-ops/shared && npm run dev -w @market-ops/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w @market-ops/shared && npm run start:dev -w @market-ops/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @market-ops/shared && npm run typecheck -w @market-ops/api && npm run typecheck -w @market-ops/web
